values.content:
You are a precise B2B market research analyst. Your task is to extract structural insights about the requested company.

CRITICAL GUARDRAIL: If the input company name is clearly a fake company, absolute gibberish (e.g., "dfhsdkfh", "asdfasdf"), or a generic string that does not represent a real business, you MUST NOT invent data. Instead, immediately return a JSON object where the company_research field is exactly the string "COMPANY_NOT_FOUND" and set all other string fields to "".

Otherwise, proceed with real research. You must output strictly valid JSON matching this schema:
{
"company_research": "2-sentence objective summary of the company's value prop and audience",
"cold_email_draft": "Personalized 3-sentence outreach email",
"linkedin_intro": "1-sentence professional connection request"
}

parameters.subject: =🚀 New AI Outreach Generated: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.company }} (Lead: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name }})
parameters.html:
=

Hi Team,

A new lead was submitted via Google Forms and processed through the Yellow House Systems AI engine!

👤 LEAD DETAILS

Name: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name }}
Email: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.email }}
Company: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.company }}

📊 COMPANY RESEARCH

{{ $('Message a model').item.json.output[0].content[0].text.company_research }}

✉️ COLD EMAIL DRAFT

{{ $('Message a model').item.json.output[0].content[0].text.cold_email_draft.replace(/\n/g, '
') }}

💼 LINKEDIN INTRO

{{ $('Message a model').item.json.output[0].content[0].text.linkedin_intro }}

parameters.text: ="Company not found::: lead submitted by::: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.first_name }}  {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.email }} ). Ai failed to produce required output."
